object.styleConfig: #domId.PCUI_ElementTable{position:relative!important;background:#fff!important;border:1px solid #e6edf7!important;border-radius:8px!important;box-shadow:0 8px 20px rgba(15,23,42,.05)!important;margin:8px!important;padding-top:38px!important;height:472px!important;max-height:472px!important;box-sizing:border-box!important;overflow:hidden!important;}#domId.PCUI_ElementTable::before{content:"考核列表  共 128 条";position:absolute;top:12px;left:18px;font-size:15px;font-weight:700;color:#2563eb;border-bottom:3px solid #2563eb;padding-bottom:8px;z-index:2;}#domId .el-table{font-size:12px!important;color:#334155!important;}#domId .el-table__header th,#domId .el-table__header tr{background:#f4f7fb!important;color:#64748b!important;font-weight:700!important;}#domId .el-table__body tr:nth-child(even){background:#fafcff!important;}#domId .el-table__body td{border-color:#edf2f7!important;height:38px!important;}#domId .el-table__body td:nth-child(8) .cell{color:#2563eb!important;font-weight:700!important;}#domId .el-table__body tr:nth-child(-n+4) td:nth-child(9) .cell{display:inline-block;min-width:56px;background:#dcfce7!important;color:#16a34a!important;border-radius:4px;font-weight:700;padding:2px 8px;}#domId .el-table__body tr:nth-child(n+5) td:nth-child(9) .cell{display:inline-block;min-width:56px;background:#ffedd5!important;color:#f97316!important;border-radius:4px;font-weight:700;padding:2px 8px;}#domId .el-table__body td:nth-child(11) .cell{display:inline-block;min-width:185px;background:#eaf3ff!important;border:1px solid #bfdbfe!important;border-radius:3px;color:#2563eb!important;font-weight:700!important;line-height:22px!important;}#domId .el-pagination{position:absolute!important;right:18px!important;top:12px!important;}
